certifications.title: Generative AI Mastermind Workshop
certifications.description: Powerful lessons on generative and agentic AI, prompt engineering, and building autonomous workflows. Strengthened skills in AI-powered workflows, custom GPTs, and human-AI augmentation.

certifications.title: Introduction to Data Science Job Simulation
certifications.description: Virtual experience simulating data science work at one of Australia's largest banks.

certifications.title: Python for Everybody Specialization

certifications.title: Foundations of AI Engineering (with Honors)
certifications.description: Rigorous industry-focused course covering the fundamentals of AI engineering including prompt engineering, LLM integration, retrieval-augmented generation, agentic workflows, and deploying AI-powered applications. Earned Honors distinction for exceptional project work and technical depth.

professionalDevelopment.title: Berkeley Changemaker Certificate
professionalDevelopment.description: Interdisciplinary program teaching critical thinking, communication, collaboration, and creating meaningful impact. Learned to question the status quo, lead with purpose, and build solutions grounded in empathy and evidence.

professionalDevelopment.title: MLT Ascend Program Scholar
professionalDevelopment.description: Accepted into personal and professional development program for first-generation college students. Attends virtual and in-person skill-building and networking events. Engages in monthly one-on-one coaching sessions.

professionalDevelopment.title: Berkeley Student Leadership Academy (BSLA)
professionalDevelopment.description: Series of engaging workshops developing leadership competencies. Topics include leadership, engagement, DEIB, communication, and conflict resolution. Minimum 7 workshops required for certificate.

professionalDevelopment.title: NAVCAL Scholar
professionalDevelopment.description: Selected as a NAVCAL (Navigating the University of California, Berkeley) Scholar, a fellowship supporting first-generation and nontraditional students in navigating UC Berkeley's academic and professional ecosystem. The program has supported over 1,000 students and facilitated $16M+ in scholarships and fellowships since its founding in 2018.

professionalDevelopment.title: TRIO SSS-STEM Scholar
professionalDevelopment.description: Enrolled in TRIO Student Support Services STEM, a federally funded program providing holistic academic counseling, STEM tutoring, and professional development for first-generation and low-income college students. Recipient of the SSS-STEM Scholar Grant Award (Spring 2026).

professionalDevelopment.title: Student Leader - Think Together
professionalDevelopment.description: Tutored 20+ peers in math and science. Coordinated meal distribution for after-school program. Assisted 13 students with college applications. Participated in environmental initiatives.

professionalDevelopment.title: Math Club President
professionalDevelopment.description: Led formation and growth from inception to 25+ active members. Designed tiered breakout groups and peer mentorship programs. Created "Math Mondays" and "Wonder Wednesdays" events.

professionalDevelopment.title: Volunteer Tutor - Harmony Elementary
professionalDevelopment.description: Tutored elementary students, facilitated arts and crafts projects, supported classroom logistics, created inclusive learning environment.

professionalDevelopment.title: Volunteer - Valley Community Pantry
professionalDevelopment.description: Organized and restocked food shelves, implemented food safety standards, helped distribute 150+ food packages.
